message:
feat(runtime): Enhance time wheel introspection and IO driver reliability

Multiple improvements across runtime subsystems:

1. time/wheel.rs, time/intrusive_wheel.rs:
   - Add introspection methods for debugging timer state
   - Enable visibility into pending timer counts per slot

2. runtime/io_driver.rs:
   - Improve error handling in poll loop
   - Better resource cleanup on driver shutdown

3. runtime/reactor/lab.rs:
   - Minor adjustments to lab reactor configuration

4. lab/chaos.rs:
   - Add new chaos injection points for testing

5. net/dns/resolver.rs:
   - Improve resolver error propagation

6. record/task.rs:
   - Add task recording instrumentation point

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
